organization.business_model: Operates 24 charter schools across Texas, providing K-12 education with a focus on STEM and digital literacy.

governance_and_policy.policy_enforcement: Ad-hoc enforcement with inconsistent documentation; relies heavily on IT Manager's discretion.

stakeholders.name: Linda Martinez
stakeholders.signature_quote: We need to balance compliance with the reality of our funding limits.

stakeholders.name: James Carter
stakeholders.signature_quote: Our on-prem infrastructure is a double-edged sword—it's stable, but hard to secure.

stakeholders.name: Maria Gonzalez
stakeholders.signature_quote: I worry that security upgrades will slow down our day-to-day operations.

stakeholders.name: David Kim
stakeholders.signature_quote: Every dollar spent on security is a dollar not invested in classroom resources.

stakeholders.name: Sarah Lee
likely_pushback: Lack of executive support for upgrades
stakeholders.signature_quote: We're fighting a losing battle with outdated systems and limited resources.

stakeholders.name: Robert Chen
likely_pushback: Focus on internal policies over technical solutions
stakeholders.signature_quote: I trust the IT team, but I need clearer guidelines on handling student data.

stakeholders.name: Emily White
likely_pushback: Need for better IT compliance reporting
stakeholders.signature_quote: Without proper documentation, we risk losing our charter authorizations.

stakeholders.name: Michael Brown
stakeholders.signature_quote: I don't want security measures to complicate our enrollment processes.

instructor_view.teaching_notes: This Charter School Network client has Low maturity. Difficulty: intermediate.
